tools.Name: Onyx
tools.Description: An open-source application layer for LLMs featuring RAG, deep research, web search, code execution, and custom agent orchestration.
tools.Use_Case: Enterprise-grade AI deployment, custom agent development, and RAG-based information retrieval.

tools.Name: Skill Seekers
tools.Description: A universal data layer that converts diverse documentation sources (GitHub, PDFs, etc.) into structured knowledge assets for AI skills, RAG, and coding assistants.
tools.Use_Case: Preprocessing and preparing documentation to act as specialized skills for LLMs like Claude or for use in RAG pipelines.

tools.Name: PraisonAI
tools.Description: A low-code, production-ready multi-agent framework that automates complex tasks through orchestrated agent teams.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex business processes, research, content creation, and delivering results to communication platforms like Discord or Telegram.
